body_transformation: Pidgeot's rounded head retains its small, soft shape but now features delicate lavender petal-like ear flaps with a subtle shimmer, while its compact body silhouette remains intact with ivory white soft fur texture replacing the original beige. The wings maintain their distinct feather patterns but transform into translucent crystalline structures with glowing starlight silver veins, and the curled tail tip becomes a soft, rounded appendage with a faint petal gold sheen. Deep pink blush marks appear subtly across the face, and the short stubby legs now bear delicate foot pads with a pearlescent finish, all while preserving the quadruped stance and low posture. The original structural shape of the pointed ears, body proportions, and tail curvature remain unchanged, only the surface textures and materials shift to ethereal fairy elements.
signature_feature: Tail tip: soft rounded petal gold appendage with delicate crystalline shimmer.
